scripts.check: npm run test && npm run test:python && npm run test:data && npm run audit:data
scripts.check:local: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p '*_test.py' && python3 scripts/validate_data.py public/data/fse2026/program.json public/data/fse2026/metadata.json && python3 scripts/audit_data.py --program public/data/fse2026/program.json --ical conferences/fse2026/event-calendar.ics
